spec_match.rationale: Shows AccentColor wired through the installed task-app mockup and now mirrors it with an open-web fallback frame that stays neutral outside the installed-PWA context.

interactive.rationale: Color picker drives a real app surface in real time across nine elements; the script directly mutates inline styles per element rather than relying on a static screenshot.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Lede promises a simulated installed PWA whose chrome is driven by AccentColor/AccentColorText; the page delivers a recognisable task-app mock-up that updates on every input.

edge_cases.rationale: Includes CSS support and display-mode probes, forced-colors simulation, a live fixed-foreground contrast warning, a black-vs-white AccentColorText comparison, and Window Controls Overlay context.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, focus override sets outline-color only, no static-card; the simulated app frame is bordered consistently with the rest of the site.

summary: The full-app mockup now compares installed-PWA AccentColor exposure against the open-web neutral fallback, surfaces support/context probes, simulates forced-colors, reports contrast decisions and fixed-foreground failures, and calls out Window Controls Overlay titlebar integration.
